backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the Cleanio booking system with types for vehicle, service, and cleaning options, and public functions to create, retrieve, update status, and assign mechanics to bookings stored in a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the bike logo image is placed to the left of the 'Cleanio' wordmark in the Layout component header, referencing the relevant file and test ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that imports base/components/utilities layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, full-service, repair, cleaning, confirmation, admin/bookings) wrapped inside the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Shared booking form component handling customer details, vehicle type, capacity, time slot selection, and cleaning sub-option mapping before submitting a booking to the backend and navigating to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/components/ChatBot.tsx: Reusable chat UI component rendering bot and user message bubbles with a typing indicator, quick-reply buttons, and a free-text input field for the repair diagnosis conversation flow.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header (logo + desktop/mobile nav), main content area, and footer. Navigation links include Home, Full Service, Repair, Cleaning, and Admin, with active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on bookings (get all, get one, create, update status, assign mechanic) by calling the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRepairConversation: Implements a multi-step chatbot conversation flow for diagnosing bike repair issues, managing message state and step transitions through categories like electrical, brake, engine, and severity/duration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with Cleanio's charcoal/orange brand CSS variables, and defines reusable component and utility classes (buttons, cards, chat bubbles, glow effects).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminBookingsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all bookings with cards showing customer info, service details, and controls to update booking status and assign a mechanic via dropdown and input fields.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Confirmation page displayed after a successful booking, showing booking ID, customer name, service type, time slot, status, and mechanic assignment details fetched by booking ID.
frontend/src/pages/CleaningPage.tsx: Cleaning service page that lets users choose between Colour Foam Washing (₹199) or Normal Foam Washing (₹149) options before presenting the BookingForm component.
frontend/src/pages/FullServicePage.tsx: Full service booking page that displays a list of included maintenance items and renders the BookingForm configured for the fullService service type with capacity selector and pricing.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showcasing the three available services (Full Service, Repair, Cleaning) with feature highlights and navigation buttons to each service booking page.
frontend/src/pages/RepairPage.tsx: Repair service page that guides users through an AI-assisted chatbot conversation to diagnose their issue, then reveals the BookingForm once the conversation is complete.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Cleanio frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts, border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Cleanio, documenting the app summary, architectural notes (services, pricing, AI chatbot), known issues, and a list of existing implemented features with their IDs and requirement references.
